comment: Ce que j'ai le moins apprécié dans Zendesk Suite, c'est que certaines fonctionnalités avancées, telles que l'intégration avec d'autres outils, nécessitent des abonnements à des niveaux de tarification plus élevés, ce qui peut être coûteux pour les petites entreprises. De plus, l'interface utilisateur pourrait être améliorée pour une navigation plus intuitive et une meilleure convivialité. Cependant, malgré ces points négatifs, Zendesk Suite reste une solution complète pour la gestion du support client.

comment: Je suis totalement dégouté de cette entreprise. J'ai eu une offre d'essai startup afin de tester le produit et voir la valeur de l'outil. Les codes fournis pour la réduction ont mal fonctionné, j'ai donc mis du temps à mettre en place l'outil. Ensuite au bout de 6 mois, pas de mail de notification, il est compliqué d'avoir un Sales disponible. J'ai résilié et 2 mois après, à ma grande surprise ils m'ont débité 2,x 222 € !!!! pour un outil que je n'ai pas utilisé et que j'ai résilié. J'ai fait un ticket support et ça a mis 1 mois pour avoir un retour ! (ZENDESK vend des solutions de gesetion de client et support et leur niveau interne est proche du néant, j'ai rarement vu autant de médiocrité).
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : 1 à 5 mois
title: Inadmissible leur gestion des clients !

date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : plus de deux ans
title: Attention au renouvellement automatique

comment: Mon expérience globale avec Confluence est très bonne. Cet outil facilite grandement la collaboration dans et entre les équipes de l’entreprise. Cela nous permet d’y rédiger la documentation technique de l’entreprise mais aussi les spécifications techniques des différents projets. D’autant plus que son intégration avec Jira rend le lien entre un ticket et une page Confluence très facile. Certaines fonctionnalités ne sont pas à la portée de tous mais pour moi Confluence reste un outil de collaboration génial et encore plus si vous avez déjà Jira.
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : plus d'un an
title: Très pratique pour gérer l’a documentation de l’entreprise

comment: Freshdesk is a robust helpdesk platform, which offers all the key helpdesk features. We have a partner who uses Freshdesk. We asked them for their feedback. They told us that they were happy with the solution and it matched their requirements, even with the Free edition. In 2015, we were looking for a helpdesk platform, because our internal solution was outdated and our budget was tight. We look at the solutions available on the market. After a very quick try we were convinced about Freshdesk: it was adopted! The Free edition (Sprout) offered us everything we needed and it was so user friendly! comment: I'm using Asana since the beginning of 2018. During this time we were looking THE project management tool for our company to be able to manage our client project. I spend a lot of time to benchmark and test the different project management tool. We decided to test Asana in the beginning of 2018 and since then, we are using everyday. At the very beginning only the project managers was using it, now everyone, included our client is using this tool.
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : plus de deux ans
title: Asana is a great project management tool

comment: I've been using Asana for several months now, and overall, I find it to be a useful project management tool. The user-friendly interface and customizable features make it easy for me to organize and manage my tasks and projects. I also appreciate the mobile app, which allows me to stay on top of my tasks when I'm on the go. However, I did find Asana's learning curve to be steep when I first started using it. It took some time for me to learn how to use all the features effectively, and I still feel like I'm not using the software to its full potential. Additionally, I've noticed that Asana's reporting capabilities are somewhat limited, and some of the views are not highly customizable. I think Asana is a useful project management tool that can help teams stay organized and productive. However it's essential to carefully evaluate the software's pros and cons to determine whether it's the right fit for your specific project management needs and budget.
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : Essai gratuit
title: Organize and Manage Projects

comment: Choosing a project management tool can be hard, and if you choose to go with the free version, you can still use it. But you might need to do extra work. The software is making many choices to help you have a way of using it to help you, thanks to views and the few things you can personnalize. When it comes to organizing your tasks it can get really easy, and really tedious too. The mobile version exist and some other software integration can make your experience worth using it.
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : plus d'un an
title: Free version is limited but can be overstepped

comment: I have had a great experience with Asana. It is a powerful and intuitive project management tool that has been a great asset for me. It has allowed me to easily organize tasks, assign tasks to team members, track progress, and ensure that all tasks are completed on time. It has also been incredibly helpful in staying organized, as I can quickly glance at all of my tasks in one place and easily adjust priorities. Overall, Asana has been a great solution to my project management needs, and I would highly recommend it to anyone looking for a powerful, intuitive, and efficient project management tool.
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : plus d'un an
title: I really love it!

comment: I think getting used to using Asana can be a bit difficult at first. Colleagues who are using the tool for the first time are having struggles for a while.

comment: I'm using Asana since the beginning of 2018. During this time we were looking THE project management tool for our company to be able to manage our client project. date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : plus de deux ans
title: Asana is a great project management tool

comment: I've been using Asana for several months now, and overall, I find it to be a useful project management tool. The user-friendly interface and customizable features make it easy for me to organize and manage my tasks and projects. I also appreciate the mobile app, which allows me to stay on top of my tasks when I'm on the go. However, I did find Asana's learning curve to be steep when I first started using it. It took some time for me to learn how to use all the features effectively, and I still feel like I'm not using the software to its full potential. Additionally, I've noticed that Asana's reporting capabilities are somewhat limited, and some of the views are not highly customizable. I think Asana is a useful project management tool that can help teams stay organized and productive. However it's essential to carefully evaluate the software's pros and cons to determine whether it's the right fit for your specific project management needs and budget.
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : Essai gratuit
title: Organize and Manage Projects

comment: I have had a great experience with Asana. It is a powerful and intuitive project management tool that has been a great asset for me. Overall, Asana has been a great solution to my project management needs, and I would highly recommend it to anyone looking for a powerful, intuitive, and efficient project management tool.

De plus, il m'aide à économiser de l'argent et du temps en me permettant de créer des graphiques moi-même plutôt que d'engager un graphiste. Pour toutes ces raisons, je recommande fortement ce logiciel qui est réellement d'utilité publique.

comment: Hootsuite was excellent back in the day, it was the industry standard, but I feel start-ups have easily surpassed them in just a matter of a few months! If you can afford their service feeds and you are happy with them, then stay with their mediocre service. If you have the option to change, there are definitely better platforms out there.
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : Essai gratuit

comment: I really like using Hootsuite to schedule all the posts I need to publish for the day on all our social networks from one place. There is no limit in the posts you can schedule per day, it's very easy to schedule them for the entire week too. You can have several channels and create reports to check the results of your posts. It's a very good app for a community manager!

comment: Mon expérience globale avec Confluence est très bonne. Cet outil facilite grandement la collaboration dans et entre les équipes de l’entreprise. Cela nous permet d’y rédiger la documentation technique de l’entreprise mais aussi les spécifications techniques des différents projets. D’autant plus que son intégration avec Jira rend le lien entre un ticket et une page Confluence très facile. Certaines fonctionnalités ne sont pas à la portée de tous mais pour moi Confluence reste un outil de collaboration génial et encore plus si vous avez déjà Jira.
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : plus d'un an
title: Très pratique pour gérer l’a documentation de l’entreprise

comment: Prior to using BirdEye, I had the vaguest notion of what entailed the process of online reviewing, HOW people and companies and businesses were actually able to procure such a steady stream of tremendous numbers of reviews and so quickly, in terms of date of service. It was bananas to me! Then, I had the pleasure of having the job of "sending a bird eye" to every one of our customers, right after I was hired, to be Dispatcher at a HVAC company, with absolutely no idea how a bird eye had anything to do with our business. I figured I just was not in on an inside joke and would have to learn that of course. I was given zero instruction other than the aforementioned line, we're talking I had NO IDEA what this was, what I was doing, or how I was going to do what I was supposed to be doing. Well, praise the high heavens and all the birds eyes in the sky that Bird Eye is what it is as I was able to learn EXACTLY what this system was, the importance of timely reviews, and exactly how to do the entire system simply by visiting the BirdEye website that first time. It is THAT intuitive and user-friendly, honestly, it's even FUN.

comment: Prior to using BirdEye, I had the vaguest notion of what entailed the process of online reviewing, HOW people and companies and businesses were actually able to procure such a steady stream of tremendous numbers of reviews and so quickly, in terms of date of service. It was bananas to me! Then, I had the pleasure of having the job of "sending a bird eye" to every one of our customers, right after I was hired, to be Dispatcher at a HVAC company, with absolutely no idea how a bird eye had anything to do with our business. I figured I just was not in on an inside joke and would have to learn that of course. I was given zero instruction other than the aforementioned line, we're talking I had NO IDEA what this was, what I was doing, or how I was going to do what I was supposed to be doing. Well, praise the high heavens and all the birds eyes in the sky that Bird Eye is what it is as I was able to learn EXACTLY what this system was, the importance of timely reviews, and exactly how to do the entire system simply by visiting the BirdEye website that first time. It is THAT intuitive and user-friendly, honestly, it's even FUN.

comment: Prior to using BirdEye, I had the vaguest notion of what entailed the process of online reviewing, HOW people and companies and businesses were actually able to procure such a steady stream of tremendous numbers of reviews and so quickly, in terms of date of service. It was bananas to me! Then, I had the pleasure of having the job of "sending a bird eye" to every one of our customers, right after I was hired, to be Dispatcher at a HVAC company, with absolutely no idea how a bird eye had anything to do with our business. I figured I just was not in on an inside joke and would have to learn that of course. I was given zero instruction other than the aforementioned line, we're talking I had NO IDEA what this was, what I was doing, or how I was going to do what I was supposed to be doing. Well, praise the high heavens and all the birds eyes in the sky that Bird Eye is what it is as I was able to learn EXACTLY what this system was, the importance of timely reviews, and exactly how to do the entire system simply by visiting the BirdEye website that first time. It is THAT intuitive and user-friendly, honestly, it's even FUN.

comment: Prior to using BirdEye, I had the vaguest notion of what entailed the process of online reviewing, HOW people and companies and businesses were actually able to procure such a steady stream of tremendous numbers of reviews and so quickly, in terms of date of service. It was bananas to me! Then, I had the pleasure of having the job of "sending a bird eye" to every one of our customers, right after I was hired, to be Dispatcher at a HVAC company, with absolutely no idea how a bird eye had anything to do with our business. I figured I just was not in on an inside joke and would have to learn that of course. I was given zero instruction other than the aforementioned line, we're talking I had NO IDEA what this was, what I was doing, or how I was going to do what I was supposed to be doing. Well, praise the high heavens and all the birds eyes in the sky that Bird Eye is what it is as I was able to learn EXACTLY what this system was, the importance of timely reviews, and exactly how to do the entire system simply by visiting the BirdEye website that first time. It is THAT intuitive and user-friendly, honestly, it's even FUN.

comment: I'm using Asana since the beginning of 2018. During this time we were looking THE project management tool for our company to be able to manage our client project. I spend a lot of time to benchmark and test the different project management tool. We decided to test Asana in the beginning of 2018 and since then, we are using everyday. At the very beginning only the project managers was using it, now everyone, included our client is using this tool.
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : plus de deux ans
title: Asana is a great project management tool

comment: I've been using Asana for several months now, and overall, I find it to be a useful project management tool. The user-friendly interface and customizable features make it easy for me to organize and manage my tasks and projects. I also appreciate the mobile app, which allows me to stay on top of my tasks when I'm on the go. However, I did find Asana's learning curve to be steep when I first started using it. It took some time for me to learn how to use all the features effectively, and I still feel like I'm not using the software to its full potential. Additionally, I've noticed that Asana's reporting capabilities are somewhat limited, and some of the views are not highly customizable. I think Asana is a useful project management tool that can help teams stay organized and productive. However it's essential to carefully evaluate the software's pros and cons to determine whether it's the right fit for your specific project management needs and budget.
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : Essai gratuit
title: Organize and Manage Projects

comment: Choosing a project management tool can be hard, and if you choose to go with the free version, you can still use it. But you might need to do extra work. The software is making many choices to help you have a way of using it to help you, thanks to views and the few things you can personnalize. When it comes to organizing your tasks it can get really easy, and really tedious too. The mobile version exist and some other software integration can make your experience worth using it.
date_experience: Temps d'utilisation du logiciel : plus d'un an

Overall, Asana has been a great solution to my project management needs, and I would highly recommend it to anyone looking for a powerful, intuitive, and efficient project management tool.

comment: I've been using Asana for several months now, and overall, I find it to be a useful project management tool. The user-friendly interface and customizable features make it easy for me to organize and manage my tasks and projects. I also appreciate the mobile app, which allows me to stay on top of my tasks when I'm on the go. However, I did find Asana's learning curve to be steep when I first started using it. It took some time for me to learn how to use all the features effectively, and I still feel like I'm not using the software to its full potential. Additionally, I've noticed that Asana's reporting capabilities are somewhat limited, and some of the views are not highly customizable. I think Asana is a useful project management tool that can help teams stay organized and productive.
